pages.text: Twelve races. One is picked at world creation; the choice is permanent except by admin override.$(br2)$(l:races/tortle)Tortle.$(/l) Shelled humanoid. Slow, durable, holds breath underwater.$(br2)$(l:races/ribbit)Ribbit.$(/l) Frog-folk. Coil-charged leaps, strict insect diet.$(br2)$(l:races/locathah)Locathah.$(/l) Fish-folk. Native to water; weakens on land.$(br2)$(l:races/elf)Elf.$(/l) Slender, sleepless. Picks one of four lineages: $(l:races/elf_high)High$(/l), $(l:races/elf_wood)Wood$(/l), $(l:races/elf_sea)Sea$(/l), $(l:races/drow)Drow$(/l).$(br2)$(l:races/aarakocra)Aarakocra.$(/l) Bird-folk. Innate flight.

$(l:races/tiefling)Tiefling.$(/l) Fiend-blooded. Fire-immune, water-vulnerable, born in the Nether.$(br2)$(l:races/dragonborn)Dragonborn.$(/l) Scaled. Active fire-breath on cooldown.$(br2)$(l:races/half_orc)Half-Orc.$(/l) Brawny. Near-death recovery, dull at magic.$(br2)$(l:races/dwarf)Dwarf.$(/l) Stout. Mining specialist, full darkvision, sinks in water.$(br2)$(l:races/human)Human.$(/l) Picks one of seven boons at world entry.$(br2)$(l:races/droid)Droid.$(/l) Constructed humanoid. Runs on iron, immune to debuff effects, weak in water and to lightning.$(br2)$(l:races/goblin)Goblin.$(/l) Small scavenger-engineer. Fast, fragile, mines metals quickly.
